title: Snapshot Store
description: Build a content-addressed snapshot store (ISnapshotStore) using payload hashing to deduplicate identical responses.

title: Trace Parser
description: Add unit tests for the Request Normalizer to cover canonicalization rules (URL, query, header ordering).

title: Mock Injector
description: Implement a configurable mock injector miss policy: strict, lenient, or record-and-augment.

title: Architecture Flow
description: Implement the <ArchitectureFlow/> pipeline component visual stages on the docs landing page.

title: Healing Diff
description: Implement the <HealingDiff/> side-by-side selector diff comparison component for broken and healed states.

title: Help Wanted Board
description: Design a React-based card grid for the documentation site showing open issues and component areas.

title: GitHub Pages Deployment
description: Build a GitHub Actions workflow to auto-build and deploy the Docusaurus docs site to GitHub Pages.
